tEn: SDXL: Improving Latent Diffusion Models for High-Resolution Image Synthesis
tZh: SDXL：改进潜在扩散模型以实现高分辨率图像合成
sEn: SDXL improves latent diffusion models for high-resolution text-to-image synthesis with a larger UNet, dual text encoders, and a refinement model.
sZh: SDXL通过更大的UNet、双文本编码器和精炼模型，改进了潜在扩散模型，实现了高分辨率文本到图像合成。
absEn: We present SDXL, a latent diffusion model for text-to-image synthesis. Compared to previous versions of Stable Diffusion, SDXL leverages a three times larger UNet backbone: The increase of model parameters is mainly due to more attention blocks and a larger cross-attention context as SDXL uses a second text encoder. We design multiple novel conditioning schemes and train SDXL on multiple aspect ratios. We also introduce a refinement model which is used to improve the visual fidelity of samples generated by SDXL using a post-hoc image-to-image technique. We demonstrate that SDXL shows drastically improved performance compared the previous versions of Stable Diffusion and achieves results competitive with those of black-box state-of-the-art image generators. In the spirit of promoting open research and fostering transparency in large model training and evaluation, we provide access to code and model weights at https://github.com/Stability-AI/generative-models
absZh: 我们提出了SDXL，一种用于文本到图像合成的潜在扩散模型。与之前版本的Stable Diffusion相比，SDXL利用了大了三倍的UNet骨干网络：模型参数的增加主要归因于更多的注意力块和更大的交叉注意力上下文，因为SDXL使用了第二个文本编码器。我们设计了多种新颖的条件化方案，并在多个宽高比上训练SDXL。我们还引入了一个精炼模型，该模型通过事后图像到图像技术用于提高SDXL生成样本的视觉保真度。我们证明，与之前版本的Stable Diffusion相比，SDXL显示出显著改进的性能，并达到了与黑盒最先进图像生成器竞争的结果。为了促进开放研究和提高大型模型训练与评估的透明度，我们在https://github.com/Stability-AI/generative-models上提供代码和模型权重。

contrib.en: Introduces SDXL with a 3x larger UNet backbone and dual text encoders for improved text-to-image synthesis.
contrib.zh: 提出SDXL，采用3倍大的UNet骨干网络和双文本编码器，提升文本到图像合成性能。

contrib.en: Proposes novel conditioning on original image size and crop coordinates to reduce cropping artifacts and improve object centering.
contrib.zh: 提出基于原始图像尺寸和裁剪坐标的新型条件机制，减少裁剪伪影并改善物体居中。

contrib.en: Implements multi-aspect ratio training with size conditioning, enabling generation at various aspect ratios without quality loss.
contrib.zh: 实现多宽高比训练与尺寸条件，支持生成多种宽高比图像且不损失质量。

contrib.en: Develops a separate refinement model using SDEdit to enhance visual fidelity of base SDXL samples.
contrib.zh: 开发独立的精炼模型，利用SDEdit提升基础SDXL样本的视觉保真度。

contrib.en: Achieves competitive performance with black-box state-of-the-art image generators while being open-source.
contrib.zh: 在开源的同时达到与黑盒最先进图像生成器竞争的性能。

contrib.en: Provides code and model weights to promote open research and transparency in large model training.
contrib.zh: 公开代码和模型权重，促进大型模型训练中的开放研究和透明度。

limits.en: Two-stage pipeline requires loading two large models, increasing memory usage and reducing sampling speed.
limits.zh: 两阶段流水线需加载两个大模型，增加内存占用并降低采样速度。

limits.en: Struggles with synthesizing intricate structures like human hands due to high variance in training data.
limits.zh: 由于训练数据中高方差，合成人手等复杂结构时存在困难。

limits.en: May exhibit concept bleeding, where distinct visual elements unintentionally merge or swap attributes.
limits.zh: 可能出现概念渗漏，即不同视觉元素意外合并或交换属性。

limits.en: Text rendering for long or legible text remains challenging, often producing random characters or inconsistencies.
limits.zh: 长文本或清晰文本的渲染仍有挑战，常产生随机字符或不一致。

limits.en: Training data biases can lead to social and racial biases in generated images, requiring careful mitigation.
limits.zh: 训练数据偏差可能导致生成图像中的社会和种族偏见，需谨慎缓解。

items.en: We present SDXL, a latent diffusion model for text-to-image synthesis. Compared to previous versions of Stable Diffusion, SDXL leverages a three times larger UNet backbone: The increase of model parameters is mainly due to more attention blocks and a larger cross-attention context as SDXL uses a second text encoder. We design multiple novel conditioning schemes and train SDXL on multiple aspect ratios. We also introduce a refinement model which is used to improve the visual fidelity of samples generated by SDXL using a post-hoc image-to-image technique. We demonstrate that SDXL shows drastically improved performance compared to previous versions of Stable Diffusion and achieves results competitive with those of black-box state-of-the-art image generators. In the spirit of promoting open research and fostering transparency in large model training and evaluation, we provide access to code and model weights.
items.zh: 我们提出了SDXL，一种用于文本到图像合成的潜在扩散模型。与之前版本的Stable Diffusion相比，SDXL利用了大了三倍的UNet骨干网络：模型参数的增加主要源于更多的注意力块和更大的交叉注意力上下文，因为SDXL使用了第二个文本编码器。我们设计了多种新颖的条件机制，并在多种宽高比上训练SDXL。我们还引入了一个精炼模型，通过事后图像到图像技术来提高SDXL生成样本的视觉保真度。我们证明，与之前版本的Stable Diffusion相比，SDXL的性能显著提升，并与黑盒最先进图像生成器的结果相竞争。本着促进开放研究和在大型模型训练与评估中培养透明度的精神，我们提供代码和模型权重的访问。

items.en: The last year has brought enormous leaps in deep generative modeling across various data domains, such as natural language [50], audio [17], and visual media [38, 37, 40, 44, 15, 3, 7]. In this report, we focus on the latter and unveil SDXL, a drastically improved version of Stable Diffusion. Stable Diffusion is a latent text-to-image diffusion model (DM) which serves as the foundation for an array of recent advancements in, e.g., 3D classification [43], controllable image editing [54], image personalization [10], synthetic data augmentation [48], graphical user interface prototyping [51], etc. Remarkably, the scope of applications has been extraordinarily extensive, encompassing fields as diverse as music generation [9] and reconstructing images from fMRI brain scans [49].
items.zh: 过去一年，深度生成建模在各个数据领域取得了巨大飞跃，例如自然语言[50]、音频[17]和视觉媒体[38, 37, 40, 44, 15, 3, 7]。在本报告中，我们关注后者，并推出了SDXL，这是Stable Diffusion的一个大幅改进版本。Stable Diffusion是一种潜在文本到图像扩散模型（DM），它是近期一系列进展的基础，例如3D分类[43]、可控图像编辑[54]、图像个性化[10]、合成数据增强[48]、图形用户界面原型设计[51]等。值得注意的是，其应用范围非常广泛，涵盖了从音乐生成[9]到从fMRI脑扫描重建图像[49]等不同领域。

items.en: User studies demonstrate that SDXL consistently surpasses all previous versions of Stable Diffusion by a significant margin (see Fig. 1). In this report, we present the design choices which lead to this boost in performance encompassing i) a 3×\times larger UNet-backbone compared to previous Stable Diffusion models (Sec. 2.1), ii) two simple yet effective additional conditioning techniques (Sec. 2.2) which do not require any form of additional supervision, and iii) a separate diffusion-based refinement model which applies a noising-denoising process [28] to the latents produced by SDXL to improve the visual quality of its samples (Sec. 2.5).
items.zh: 用户研究表明，SDXL始终以显著优势超越所有先前版本的Stable Diffusion（见图1）。在本报告中，我们介绍了导致性能提升的设计选择，包括：i) 与之前的Stable Diffusion模型相比，UNet骨干网络大了3倍（第2.1节），ii) 两种简单而有效的额外条件技术（第2.2节），不需要任何形式的额外监督，以及iii) 一个独立的基于扩散的精炼模型，该模型对SDXL产生的潜在表示应用加噪-去噪过程[28]，以提高其样本的视觉质量（第2.5节）。

items.en: A major concern in the field of visual media creation is that while black-box-models are often recognized as state-of-the-art, the opacity of their architecture prevents faithfully assessing and validating their performance. This lack of transparency hampers reproducibility, stifles innovation, and prevents the community from building upon these models to further the progress of science and art. Moreover, these closed-source strategies make it challenging to assess the biases and limitations of these models in an impartial and objective way, which is crucial for their responsible and ethical deployment. With SDXL we are releasing an open model that achieves competitive performance with black-box image generation models (see Fig. 10 & Fig. 11).
items.zh: 视觉媒体创作领域的一个主要担忧是，虽然黑盒模型通常被认为是当前最先进的，但其架构的不透明性阻碍了对其性能的忠实评估和验证。这种缺乏透明度的做法损害了可重复性，扼杀了创新，并阻止社区在这些模型的基础上进一步推动科学和艺术的进步。此外，这些闭源策略使得公正客观地评估这些模型的偏见和局限性变得困难，而这对于它们的负责任和道德部署至关重要。通过SDXL，我们发布了一个开放模型，其性能可与黑盒图像生成模型相竞争（见图10和图11）。

items.en: In this section we present our improvements for the Stable Diffusion architecture. These are modular, and can be used individually or together to extend any model. Although the following strategies are implemented as extensions to latent diffusion models (LDMs) [38], most of them are also applicable to their pixel-space counterparts.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们介绍了对Stable Diffusion架构的改进。这些改进是模块化的，可以单独或组合使用以扩展任何模型。尽管以下策略是作为潜在扩散模型（LDM）[38]的扩展实现的，但其中大多数也适用于其像素空间对应物。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Left: Comparing user preferences between SDXL and Stable Diffusion 1.5 & 2.1. While SDXL already clearly outperforms Stable Diffusion 1.5 & 2.1, adding the additional refinement stage boosts performance. Right: Visualization of the two-stage pipeline: We generate initial latents of size 128×128128128128\times 128 using SDXL. Afterwards, we utilize a specialized high-resolution refinement model and apply SDEdit [28] on the latents generated in the first step, using the same prompt. SDXL and the refinement model use the same autoencoder.
items.capZh: 图1：左图：比较SDXL与Stable Diffusion 1.5和2.1之间的用户偏好。虽然SDXL已经明显优于Stable Diffusion 1.5和2.1，但添加额外的精炼阶段进一步提升了性能。右图：两阶段管道的可视化：我们使用SDXL生成大小为128×128的初始潜在表示。之后，我们利用专门的高分辨率精炼模型，对第一步生成的潜在表示应用SDEdit [28]，使用相同的提示。SDXL和精炼模型使用相同的自编码器。

items.en: Starting with the seminal works Ho et al. [14] and Song et al. [47], which demonstrated that DMs are powerful generative models for image synthesis, the convolutional UNet [39] architecture has been the dominant architecture for diffusion-based image synthesis. However, with the development of foundational DMs [40, 37, 38], the underlying architecture has constantly evolved: from adding self-attention and improved upscaling layers [5], over cross-attention for text-to-image synthesis [38], to pure transformer-based architectures [33].
items.zh: 从Ho等人[14]和Song等人[47]的开创性工作开始，这些工作证明了扩散模型是图像合成的强大生成模型，卷积UNet [39]架构一直是基于扩散的图像合成的主导架构。然而，随着基础扩散模型[40, 37, 38]的发展，底层架构也在不断演变：从添加自注意力和改进的上采样层[5]，到用于文本到图像合成的交叉注意力[38]，再到纯基于Transformer的架构[33]。

items.en: We follow this trend and, following Hoogeboom et al. [16], shift the bulk of the transformer computation to lower-level features in the UNet. In particular, and in contrast to the original Stable Diffusion architecture, we use a heterogeneous distribution of transformer blocks within the UNet: For efficiency reasons, we omit the transformer block at the highest feature level, use 2 and 10 blocks at the lower levels, and remove the lowest level (8×8\times downsampling) in the UNet altogether — see Tab. 1 for a comparison between the architectures of Stable Diffusion 1.x & 2.x and SDXL. We opt for a more powerful pre-trained text encoder that we use for text conditioning. Specifically, we use OpenCLIP ViT-bigG [19] in combination with CLIP ViT-L [34], where we concatenate the penultimate text encoder outputs along the channel-axis [1]. Besides using cross-attention layers to condition the model on the text-input, we follow [30] and additionally condition the model on the pooled text embedding from the OpenCLIP model. These changes result in a model size of 2.6B parameters in the UNet, see Tab. 1. The text encoders have a total size of 817M parameters.
items.zh: 我们遵循这一趋势，并按照Hoogeboom等人[16]的做法，将Transformer计算的主要部分转移到UNet中的低层特征。特别是，与原始Stable Diffusion架构相比，我们在UNet内部使用了异构的Transformer块分布：出于效率原因，我们省略了最高特征层的Transformer块，在较低层使用2个和10个块，并完全移除了UNet中的最低层（8倍下采样）——见表1，比较Stable Diffusion 1.x和2.x与SDXL的架构。我们选择了一个更强大的预训练文本编码器用于文本条件。具体来说，我们使用OpenCLIP ViT-bigG [19]与CLIP ViT-L [34]的组合，其中我们将倒数第二层文本编码器的输出沿通道轴连接[1]。除了使用交叉注意力层将模型条件于文本输入外，我们遵循[30]并额外将模型条件于来自OpenCLIP模型的池化文本嵌入。这些变化导致UNet的模型大小为2.6B参数，见表1。文本编码器的总大小为817M参数。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Height-vs-Width distribution of our pre-training dataset. Without the proposed size-conditioning, 39% of the data would be discarded due to edge lengths smaller than 256 pixels as visualized by the dashed black lines. Color intensity in each visualized cell is proportional to the number of samples.
items.capZh: 图2：我们预训练数据集的宽高分布。如果没有提出的尺寸条件，39%的数据会因边长小于256像素而被丢弃，如虚线黑线所示。每个可视化单元格中的颜色强度与样本数量成比例。

items.en: A notorious shortcoming of the LDM paradigm [38] is the fact that training a model requires a minimal image size, due to its two-stage architecture. The two main approaches to tackle this problem are either to discard all training images below a certain minimal resolution (for example, Stable Diffusion 1.4/1.5 discarded all images with any size below 512 pixels), or, alternatively, upscale images that are too small. However, depending on the desired image resolution, the former method can lead to significant portions of the training data being discarded, what will likely lead to a loss in performance and hurt generalization. We visualize such effects in Fig. 2 for the dataset on which SDXL was pretrained. For this particular choice of data, discarding all samples below our pretraining resolution of 2562superscript2562256^{2} pixels would lead to a significant 39% of discarded data. The second method, on the other hand, usually introduces upscaling artifacts which may leak into the final model outputs, causing, for example, blurry samples.
items.zh: LDM范式[38]的一个众所周知缺点是，由于其两阶段架构，训练模型需要最小的图像尺寸。解决这个问题的主要方法有两种：要么丢弃所有低于某个最小分辨率的训练图像（例如，Stable Diffusion 1.4/1.5丢弃了所有尺寸低于512像素的图像），要么将太小的图像上采样。然而，根据所需的图像分辨率，前一种方法可能导致大量训练数据被丢弃，这很可能会导致性能下降并损害泛化能力。我们在图2中展示了SDXL预训练数据集的这种效应。对于这个特定的数据选择，丢弃所有低于我们预训练分辨率256²像素的样本将导致39%的数据被丢弃。另一方面，第二种方法通常会引入上采样伪影，这些伪影可能泄漏到最终模型输出中，导致例如模糊样本。

items.en: Instead, we propose to condition the UNet model on the original image resolution, which is trivially available during training. In particular, we provide the original (i.e., before any rescaling) height and width of the images as an additional conditioning to the model 𝐜size=(horiginal,woriginal)subscript𝐜sizesubscriptℎoriginalsubscript𝑤original\mathbf{c}_{\text{size}}=(h_{\text{original}},w_{\text{original}}). Each component is independently embedded using a Fourier feature encoding, and these encodings are concatenated into a single vector that we feed into the model by adding it to the timestep embedding [5].
items.zh: 相反，我们建议将UNet模型条件于原始图像分辨率，这在训练期间是容易获得的。具体来说，我们将图像的原始（即任何缩放之前）高度和宽度作为额外的条件提供给模型：c_size = (h_original, w_original)。每个分量使用傅里叶特征编码独立嵌入，并将这些编码连接成一个向量，通过将其添加到时间步嵌入[5]中馈入模型。

items.capEn: Figure 3: The effects of varying the size-conditioning: We show draw 4 samples with the same random seed from SDXL and vary the size-conditioning as depicted above each column. The image quality clearly increases when conditioning on larger image sizes. Samples from the 5122superscript5122512^{2} model, see Sec. 2.5. Note: For this visualization, we use the 512×512512512512\times 512 pixel base model (see Sec. 2.5), since the effect of size conditioning is more clearly visible before 1024×1024102410241024\times 1024 finetuning. Best viewed zoomed in.
items.capZh: 图3：改变尺寸条件的效果：我们使用相同的随机种子从SDXL抽取4个样本，并改变尺寸条件，如上每列所示。当条件于更大的图像尺寸时，图像质量明显提高。来自512²模型的样本，见第2.5节。注意：对于此可视化，我们使用512×512像素的基础模型（见第2.5节），因为在1024×1024微调之前，尺寸条件的效果更清晰可见。建议放大查看。

items.en: At inference time, a user can then set the desired apparent resolution of the image via this size-conditioning. Evidently (see Fig. 3), the model has learned to associate the conditioning csizesubscript𝑐sizec_{\text{size}} with resolution-dependent image features, which can be leveraged to modify the appearance of an output corresponding to a given prompt. Note that for the visualization shown in Fig. 3, we visualize samples generated by the 512×512512512512\times 512 model (see Sec. 2.5 for details), since the effects of the size conditioning are less clearly visible after the subsequent multi-aspect (ratio) finetuning which we use for our final SDXL model.
items.zh: 在推理时，用户可以通过此尺寸条件设置图像的期望表观分辨率。显然（见图3），模型已经学会了将条件c_size与分辨率相关的图像特征关联起来，这可以用来修改给定提示对应的输出外观。注意，对于图3所示的可视化，我们展示了由512×512模型（详见第2.5节）生成的样本，因为在我们用于最终SDXL模型的多宽高比微调之后，尺寸条件的效果不太清晰可见。

items.en: We quantitatively assess the effects of this simple but effective conditioning technique by training and evaluating three LDMs on class conditional ImageNet [4] at spatial size 5122superscript5122512^{2}: For the first model (CIN-512-only) we discard all training examples with at least one edge smaller than 512512512 pixels what results in a train dataset of only 70k images. For CIN-nocond we use all training examples but without size conditioning. This additional conditioning is only used for CIN-size-cond. After training we generate 5k samples with 50 DDIM steps [46] and (classifier-free) guidance scale of 5 [13] for every model and compute IS [42] and FID [12] (against the full validation set). For CIN-size-cond we generate samples always conditioned on 𝐜size=(512,512)subscript𝐜size512512\mathbf{c}_{\text{size}}=(512,512). Tab. 2 summarizes the results and verifies that CIN-size-cond improves upon the baseline models in both metrics. We attribute the degraded performance of CIN-512-only to bad generalization due to overfitting on the small training dataset while the effects of a mode of blurry samples in the sample distribution of CIN-nocond result in a reduced FID score. Note that, although we find these classical quantitative scores not to be suitable for evaluating the performance of foundational (text-to-image) DMs [40, 37, 38] (see App. F), they remain reasonable metrics on ImageNet as the neural backbones of FID and IS have been trained on ImageNet itself.
items.zh: 我们通过训练和评估三个在空间尺寸512²上的类条件ImageNet [4] LDM来定量评估这种简单但有效的条件技术的效果：对于第一个模型（CIN-512-only），我们丢弃所有至少一个边缘小于512像素的训练样本，这导致训练数据集只有7万张图像。对于CIN-nocond，我们使用所有训练样本但不使用尺寸条件。这种额外的条件仅用于CIN-size-cond。训练后，我们为每个模型生成5k个样本，使用50步DDIM [46]和（无分类器）引导尺度5 [13]，并计算IS [42]和FID [12]（针对完整验证集）。对于CIN-size-cond，我们始终条件于c_size = (512, 512)生成样本。表2总结了结果，并验证了CIN-size-cond在两个指标上都优于基线模型。我们将CIN-512-only的性能下降归因于在小训练数据集上过拟合导致的泛化不良，而CIN-nocond样本分布中的模糊样本模式导致FID分数降低。注意，尽管我们发现这些经典定量分数不适合评估基础（文本到图像）扩散模型[40, 37, 38]的性能（见附录F），但由于FID和IS的神经骨干已在ImageNet本身上训练，它们在ImageNet上仍然是合理的指标。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Comparison of the output of SDXL with previous versions of Stable Diffusion. For each prompt, we show 3 random samples of the respective model for 50 steps of the DDIM sampler [46] and cfg-scale 8.08.08.0 [13]. Additional samples in Fig. 14.
items.capZh: 图4：SDXL与先前版本Stable Diffusion的输出比较。对于每个提示，我们展示相应模型在50步DDIM采样器[46]和cfg尺度8.0 [13]下的3个随机样本。更多样本见图14。

items.en: The first two rows of Fig. 4 illustrate a typical failure mode of previous SD models: Synthesized objects can be cropped, such as the cut-off head of the cat in the left examples for SD 1-5 and SD 2-1. An intuitive explanation for this behavior is the use of random cropping during training of the model: As collating a batch in DL frameworks such as PyTorch [32] requires tensors of the same size, a typical processing pipeline is to (i) resize an image such that the shortest size matches the desired target size, followed by (ii) randomly cropping the image along the longer axis. While random cropping is a natural form of data augmentation, it can leak into the generated samples, causing the malicious effects shown above.
items.zh: 图4的前两行展示了先前SD模型的一个典型失败模式：合成对象可能被裁剪，例如左侧示例中SD 1-5和SD 2-1的猫头被截断。这种行为的一个直观解释是训练期间使用了随机裁剪：由于在PyTorch [32]等深度学习框架中整理批次需要相同大小的张量，典型的处理流程是(i)将图像调整大小，使最短边匹配目标大小，然后(ii)沿较长轴随机裁剪图像。虽然随机裁剪是一种自然的数据增强形式，但它可能泄漏到生成的样本中，导致上述不良效果。

items.en: To fix this problem, we propose another simple yet effective conditioning method: During dataloading, we uniformly sample crop coordinates ctopsubscript𝑐topc_{\text{top}} and cleftsubscript𝑐leftc_{\text{left}} (integers specifying the amount of pixels cropped from the top-left corner along the height and width axes, respectively) and feed them into the model as conditioning parameters via Fourier feature embeddings, similar to the size conditioning described above. The concatenated embedding 𝐜cropsubscript𝐜crop\mathbf{c}_{\text{crop}} is then used as an additional conditioning parameter. We emphasize that this technique is not limited to LDMs and could be used for any DM. Note that crop- and size-conditioning can be readily combined. In such a case, we concatenate the feature embedding along the channel dimension, before adding it to the timestep embedding in the UNet. Alg. 1 illustrates how we sample 𝐜cropsubscript𝐜crop\mathbf{c}_{\text{crop}} and 𝐜sizesubscript𝐜size\mathbf{c}_{\text{size}} during training if such a combination is applied.
items.zh: 为了解决这个问题，我们提出了另一种简单而有效的条件方法：在数据加载期间，我们均匀采样裁剪坐标c_top和c_left（分别指定从左上角沿高度和宽度轴裁剪的像素数量的整数），并通过傅里叶特征嵌入将它们作为条件参数馈入模型，类似于上述的尺寸条件。连接后的嵌入c_crop然后用作额外的条件参数。我们强调，这种技术不仅限于LDM，可以用于任何扩散模型。注意，裁剪条件和尺寸条件可以很容易地结合。在这种情况下，我们将特征嵌入沿通道维度连接，然后将其添加到UNet中的时间步嵌入中。算法1说明了在训练期间如果应用这种组合，我们如何采样c_crop和c_size。

items.en: Given that in our experience large scale datasets are, on average, object-centric, we set (ctop,cleft)=(0,0)subscript𝑐topsubscript𝑐left00\left(c_{\text{top}},c_{\text{left}}\right)=\left(0,0\right) during inference and thereby obtain object-centered samples from the trained model.
items.zh: 鉴于根据我们的经验，大规模数据集通常是对象中心的，我们在推理期间设置(c_top, c_left) = (0, 0)，从而从训练模型中获得对象中心的样本。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Varying the crop conditioning as discussed in Sec. 2.2. See Fig. 4 and Fig. 14 for samples from SD 1.5 and SD 2.1 which provide no explicit control of this parameter and thus introduce cropping artifacts. Samples from the 5122superscript5122512^{2} model, see Sec. 2.5.
items.capZh: 图5：改变裁剪条件，如第2.2节所述。参见图4和图14中来自SD 1.5和SD 2.1的样本，它们没有提供对此参数的显式控制，因此引入了裁剪伪影。来自512²模型的样本，见第2.5节。

items.en: See Fig. 5 for an illustration: By tuning (ctop,cleft)subscript𝑐topsubscript𝑐left\left(c_{\text{top}},c_{\text{left}}\right), we can successfully simulate the amount of cropping during inference. This is a form of conditioning-augmentation, and has been used in various forms with autoregressive [20] models, and more recently with diffusion models [21].
items.zh: 参见图5的说明：通过调整(ctop,cleft)，我们可以成功模拟推理过程中的裁剪量。这是一种条件增强形式，已以各种形式用于自回归模型[20]，最近也用于扩散模型[21]。

items.en: While other methods like data bucketing [31] successfully tackle the same task, we still benefit from cropping-induced data augmentation, while making sure that it does not leak into the generation process - we actually use it to our advantage to gain more control over the image synthesis process. Furthermore, it is easy to implement and can be applied in an online fashion during training, without additional data preprocessing.
items.zh: 虽然其他方法如数据分桶[31]成功解决了同一任务，但我们仍然受益于裁剪带来的数据增强，同时确保它不会泄漏到生成过程中——实际上，我们利用它来获得对图像合成过程的更多控制。此外，它易于实现，可以在训练期间在线应用，无需额外的数据预处理。

items.en: Real-world datasets include images of widely varying sizes and aspect-ratios (c.f. fig. 2) While the common output resolutions for text-to-image models are square images of 512×512512512512\times 512 or 1024×1024102410241024\times 1024 pixels, we argue that this is a rather unnatural choice, given the widespread distribution and use of landscape (e.g., 16:9) or portrait format screens.
items.zh: 真实世界的数据集包含尺寸和宽高比差异很大的图像（参见图2）。虽然文本到图像模型的常见输出分辨率是512×512或1024×1024像素的正方形图像，但我们认为这是一个相当不自然的选择，考虑到横向（例如16:9）或纵向格式屏幕的广泛分布和使用。

items.en: Motivated by this, we finetune our model to handle multiple aspect-ratios simultaneously: We follow common practice [31] and partition the data into buckets of different aspect ratios, where we keep the pixel count as close to 10242superscript102421024^{2} pixels as possibly, varying height and width accordingly in multiples of 64. A full list of all aspect ratios used for training is provided in App. I. During optimization, a training batch is composed of images from the same bucket, and we alternate between bucket sizes for each training step. Additionally, the model receives the bucket size (or, target size) as a conditioning, represented as a tuple of integers 𝐜ar=(htgt,wtgt)subscript𝐜arsubscriptℎtgtsubscript𝑤tgt\mathbf{c}_{\text{ar}}=(h_{\text{tgt}},w_{\text{tgt}}) which are embedded into a Fourier space in analogy to the size- and crop-conditionings described above.
items.zh: 受此启发，我们对模型进行微调，使其能够同时处理多种宽高比：我们遵循常见做法[31]，将数据划分为不同宽高比的桶，同时尽可能保持像素数接近1024²像素，相应地以64的倍数变化高度和宽度。训练中使用的所有宽高比的完整列表见附录I。在优化过程中，训练批次由来自同一桶的图像组成，并且我们在每个训练步骤中交替使用不同的桶大小。此外，模型接收桶大小（或目标大小）作为条件，表示为整数元组𝐜ar=(htgt,wtgt)，这些整数被嵌入到傅里叶空间中，类似于上述尺寸和裁剪条件。

items.en: In practice, we apply multi-aspect training as a finetuning stage after pretraining the model at a fixed aspect-ratio and resolution and combine it with the conditioning techniques introduced in Sec. 2.2 via concatenation along the channel axis. Fig. 16 in App. J provides python-code for this operation. Note that crop-conditioning and multi-aspect training are complementary operations, and crop-conditioning then only works within the bucket boundaries (usually 64 pixels). For ease of implementation, however, we opt to keep this control parameter for multi-aspect models.
items.zh: 在实践中，我们在固定宽高比和分辨率下预训练模型后，将多宽高比训练作为微调阶段应用，并通过沿通道轴连接将其与第2.2节中引入的条件技术结合。附录J中的图16提供了此操作的Python代码。请注意，裁剪条件和多宽高比训练是互补的操作，裁剪条件仅在桶边界内（通常为64像素）有效。然而，为简化实现，我们选择为多宽高比模型保留此控制参数。

items.en: Stable Diffusion is a LDM, operating in a pretrained, learned (and fixed) latent space of an autoencoder. While the bulk of the semantic composition is done by the LDM [38], we can improve local, high-frequency details in generated images by improving the autoencoder. To this end, we train the same autoencoder architecture used for the original Stable Diffusion at a larger batch-size (256 vs 9) and additionally track the weights with an exponential moving average. The resulting autoencoder outperforms the original model in all evaluated reconstruction metrics, see Tab. 3. We use this autoencoder for all of our experiments.
items.zh: Stable Diffusion是一种LDM，在自编码器的预训练、学习（且固定）的潜在空间中运行。虽然语义组合的主要部分由LDM[38]完成，但我们可以通过改进自编码器来改善生成图像中的局部高频细节。为此，我们以更大的批量大小（256 vs 9）训练用于原始Stable Diffusion的相同自编码器架构，并额外使用指数移动平均跟踪权重。得到的自编码器在所有评估的重建指标上均优于原始模型，见表3。我们在所有实验中使用此自编码器。

items.en: We train the final model, SDXL, in a multi-stage procedure. SDXL uses the autoencoder from Sec. 2.4 and a discrete-time diffusion schedule [14, 45] with 100010001000 steps. First, we pretrain a base model (see Tab. 1) on an internal dataset whose height- and width-distribution is visualized in Fig. 2 for 600 000600000600\,000 optimization steps at a resolution of 256×256256256256\times 256 pixels and a batch-size of 204820482048, using size- and crop-conditioning as described in Sec. 2.2. We continue training on 512×512512512512\times 512 pixel images for another 200 000200000200\,000 optimization steps, and finally utilize multi-aspect training (Sec. 2.3) in combination with an offset-noise [11, 25] level of 0.050.050.05 to train the model on different aspect ratios (Sec. 2.3, App. I) of ∼similar-to\sim 1024×1024102410241024\times 1024 pixel area.
items.zh: 我们以多阶段过程训练最终模型SDXL。SDXL使用第2.4节的自编码器和离散时间扩散调度[14, 45]，共1000步。首先，我们在内部数据集上预训练基础模型（见表1），该数据集的高度和宽度分布如图2所示，在256×256像素分辨率下进行600,000步优化，批量大小为2048，并使用第2.2节所述的尺寸和裁剪条件。我们继续在512×512像素图像上训练另外200,000步，最后利用多宽高比训练（第2.3节）结合偏移噪声[11, 25]水平0.05，在不同宽高比（第2.3节，附录I）下训练模型，面积约为1024×1024像素。

items.en: Empirically, we find that the resulting model sometimes yields samples of low local quality, see Fig. 6. To improve sample quality, we train a separate LDM in the same latent space, which is specialized on high-quality, high resolution data and employ a noising-denoising process as introduced by SDEdit [28] on the samples from the base model. We follow [1] and specialize this refinement model on the first 200 (discrete) noise scales. During inference, we render latents from the base SDXL, and directly diffuse and denoise them in latent space with the refinement model (see Fig. 1), using the same text input. We note that this step is optional, but improves sample quality for detailed backgrounds and human faces, as demonstrated in Fig. 6 and Fig. 13.
items.zh: 根据经验，我们发现得到的模型有时会产生局部质量较低的样本，见图6。为了改善样本质量，我们在相同潜在空间中训练一个单独的LDM，专门针对高质量、高分辨率数据，并对基础模型的样本采用SDEdit[28]引入的加噪-去噪过程。我们遵循[1]将此细化模型专门用于前200个（离散）噪声尺度。在推理过程中，我们从基础SDXL渲染潜在变量，并使用细化模型在潜在空间中直接扩散和去噪（见图1），使用相同的文本输入。我们注意到这一步是可选的，但可以改善详细背景和人脸的样本质量，如图6和图13所示。

items.en: To assess the performance of our model (with and without refinement stage), we conduct a user study, and let users pick their favorite generation from the following four models: SDXL, SDXL (with refiner), Stable Diffusion 1.5 and Stable Diffusion 2.1. The results demonstrate the SDXL with the refinement stage is the highest rated choice, and outperforms Stable Diffusion 1.5 & 2.1 by a significant margin (win rates: SDXL w/ refinement: 48.44%percent48.4448.44\%, SDXL base: 36.93%percent36.9336.93\%, Stable Diffusion 1.5: 7.91%percent7.917.91\%, Stable Diffusion 2.1: 6.71%percent6.716.71\%). See Fig. 1, which also provides an overview of the full pipeline. However, when using classical performance metrics such as FID and CLIP scores the improvements of SDXL over previous methods are not reflected as shown in Fig. 12 and discussed in App. F. This aligns with and further backs the findings of Kirstain et al. [23].
items.zh: 为了评估我们模型的性能（有无细化阶段），我们进行了一项用户研究，让用户从以下四个模型中选择他们最喜欢的生成结果：SDXL、SDXL（带细化器）、Stable Diffusion 1.5和Stable Diffusion 2.1。结果表明，带细化阶段的SDXL是评分最高的选择，并以显著优势优于Stable Diffusion 1.5和2.1（胜率：SDXL带细化：48.44%，SDXL基础：36.93%，Stable Diffusion 1.5：7.91%，Stable Diffusion 2.1：6.71%）。参见图1，该图还提供了完整流程的概览。然而，当使用FID和CLIP分数等经典性能指标时，SDXL相对于先前方法的改进并未体现，如图12所示，并在附录F中讨论。这与Kirstain等人[23]的发现一致并进一步支持了他们的结论。

items.capEn: Figure 6: 10242superscript102421024^{2} samples (with zoom-ins) from SDXL without (left) and with (right) the refinement model discussed. Prompt: “Epic long distance cityscape photo of New York City flooded by the ocean and overgrown buildings and jungle ruins in rainforest, at sunset, cinematic shot, highly detailed, 8k, golden light”. See Fig. 13 for additional samples.
items.capZh: 图6：来自SDXL的1024²样本（带放大视图），左侧为无细化模型，右侧为有细化模型。提示词：“Epic long distance cityscape photo of New York City flooded by the ocean and overgrown buildings and jungle ruins in rainforest, at sunset, cinematic shot, highly detailed, 8k, golden light”。更多样本见图13。

items.en: This report presents a preliminary analysis of improvements to the foundation model Stable Diffusion for text-to-image synthesis. While we achieve significant improvements in synthesized image quality, prompt adherence and composition, in the following, we discuss a few aspects for which we believe the model may be improved further:
items.zh: 本报告对基础模型Stable Diffusion在文本到图像合成方面的改进进行了初步分析。虽然我们在合成图像质量、提示遵循度和构图方面取得了显著改进，但以下我们讨论了一些我们认为模型可能进一步改进的方面：

items.en: Single stage: Currently, we generate the best samples from SDXL using a two-stage approach with an additional refinement model. This results in having to load two large models into memory, hampering accessibility and sampling speed. Future work should investigate ways to provide a single stage of equal or better quality.
items.zh: 单阶段：目前，我们使用带有额外细化模型的两阶段方法生成SDXL的最佳样本。这导致需要将两个大模型加载到内存中，影响了可访问性和采样速度。未来的工作应研究提供同等或更高质量的单阶段方法。

items.en: Text synthesis: While the scale and the larger text encoder (OpenCLIP ViT-bigG [19]) help to improve the text rendering capabilities over previous versions of Stable Diffusion, incorporating byte-level tokenizers [52, 27] or simply scaling the model to larger sizes [53, 40] may further improve text synthesis.
items.zh: 文本合成：虽然更大的规模和更大的文本编码器（OpenCLIP ViT-bigG [19]）有助于改善文本渲染能力，但引入字节级分词器[52, 27]或简单地将模型扩展到更大尺寸[53, 40]可能进一步改善文本合成。

items.en: Architecture: During the exploration stage of this work, we briefly experimented with transformer-based architectures such as UViT [16] and DiT [33], but found no immediate benefit. We remain, however, optimistic that a careful hyperparameter study will eventually enable scaling to much larger transformer-dominated architectures.
items.zh: 架构：在本工作的探索阶段，我们简要尝试了基于Transformer的架构，如UViT [16]和DiT [33]，但未发现直接收益。然而，我们仍然乐观地认为，通过仔细的超参数研究，最终将能够扩展到以Transformer为主的更大架构。

items.en: Distillation: While our improvements over the original Stable Diffusion model are significant, they come at the price of increased inference cost (both in VRAM and sampling speed). Future work will thus focus on decreasing the compute needed for inference, and increased sampling speed, for example through guidance- [29], knowledge- [6, 22, 24] and progressive distillation [41, 2, 29].
items.zh: 蒸馏：虽然我们对原始Stable Diffusion模型的改进是显著的，但这是以增加推理成本（包括VRAM和采样速度）为代价的。因此，未来的工作将集中于减少推理所需的算力，并提高采样速度，例如通过引导[29]、知识[6, 22, 24]和渐进蒸馏[41, 2, 29]。

items.en: Our model is trained in the discrete-time formulation of [14], and requires offset-noise [11, 25] for aesthetically pleasing results. The EDM-framework of Karras et al. [21] is a promising candidate for future model training, as its formulation in continuous time allows for increased sampling flexibility and does not require noise-schedule corrections.
items.zh: 我们的模型在[14]的离散时间公式中训练，并且需要偏移噪声[11, 25]以获得美观的结果。Karras等人[21]的EDM框架是未来模型训练的一个有希望的候选方案，因为其在连续时间中的公式允许更大的采样灵活性，并且不需要噪声调度校正。

items.en: We thank all the folks at StabilityAI who worked on comparisons, code, etc, in particular: Alex Goodwin, Benjamin Aubin, Bill Cusick, Dennis Nitrosocke Niedworok, Dominik Lorenz, Harry Saini, Ian Johnson, Ju Huo, Katie May, Mohamad Diab, Peter Baylies, Rahim Entezari, Yam Levi, Yannik Marek, Yizhou Zheng. We also thank ChatGPT for providing writing assistance.
items.zh: 我们感谢StabilityAI的所有同事在比较、代码等方面的工作，特别是：Alex Goodwin, Benjamin Aubin, Bill Cusick, Dennis Nitrosocke Niedworok, Dominik Lorenz, Harry Saini, Ian Johnson, Ju Huo, Katie May, Mohamad Diab, Peter Baylies, Rahim Entezari, Yam Levi, Yannik Marek, Yizhou Zheng。我们也感谢ChatGPT提供的写作帮助。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Failure cases of SDXL despite large improvements compared to previous versions of Stable Diffusion, the model sometimes still struggles with very complex prompts involving detailed spatial arrangements and detailed descriptions (e.g. top left example). Moreover, hands are not yet always correctly generated (e.g. top left) and the model sometimes suffers from two concepts bleeding into one another (e.g. bottom right example). All examples are random samples generated with 50 steps of the DDIM sampler [46] and cfg-scale 8.08.08.0 [13].
items.capZh: 图7：SDXL的失败案例。尽管与先前版本的Stable Diffusion相比有大幅改进，但模型有时仍然难以处理涉及详细空间排列和详细描述的非常复杂的提示（例如左上角示例）。此外，手部并不总是正确生成（例如左上角），并且模型有时会出现两个概念相互渗透的问题（例如右下角示例）。所有示例均为使用DDIM采样器[46] 50步和cfg-scale 8.0 [13]生成的随机样本。

items.en: While our model has demonstrated impressive capabilities in generating realistic images and synthesizing complex scenes, it is important to acknowledge its inherent limitations. Understanding these limitations is crucial for further improvements and ensuring responsible use of the technology.
items.zh: 虽然我们的模型在生成逼真图像和合成复杂场景方面展示了令人印象深刻的能力，但承认其固有局限性也很重要。理解这些局限性对于进一步改进和确保负责任地使用该技术至关重要。

items.en: Firstly, the model may encounter challenges when synthesizing intricate structures, such as human hands (see Fig. 7, top left). Although it has been trained on a diverse range of data, the complexity of human anatomy poses a difficulty in achieving accurate representations consistently. This limitation suggests the need for further scaling and training techniques specifically targeting the synthesis of fine-grained details. A reason for this occurring might be that hands and similar objects appear with very high variance in photographs and it is hard for the model to extract the knowledge of the real 3D shape and physical limitations in that case.
items.zh: 首先，模型在合成复杂结构（如人手）时可能遇到挑战（见图7左上角）。尽管它已在多样化的数据上训练，但人体解剖学的复杂性使得难以一致地实现准确表示。这一局限性表明需要进一步扩展和针对细粒度细节合成的训练技术。出现这种情况的一个原因可能是手和类似物体在照片中具有非常高的方差，模型难以在这种情况下提取真实3D形状和物理限制的知识。

items.en: Secondly, while the model achieves a remarkable level of realism in its generated images, it is important to note that it does not attain perfect photorealism. Certain nuances, such as subtle lighting effects or minute texture variations, may still be absent or less faithfully represented in the generated images. This limitation implies that caution should be exercised when relying solely on model-generated visuals for applications that require a high degree of visual fidelity.
items.zh: 其次，虽然模型在生成图像方面达到了显著的逼真度，但值得注意的是，它并未实现完美的照片级真实感。某些细微之处，如微妙的照明效果或微小的纹理变化，在生成的图像中可能仍然缺失或表现不够忠实。这一局限性意味着，在需要高度视觉保真度的应用中，仅依赖模型生成的视觉内容时应谨慎行事。

items.en: Furthermore, the model’s training process heavily relies on large-scale datasets, which can inadvertently introduce social and racial biases. As a result, the model may inadvertently exacerbate these biases when generating images or inferring visual attributes.
items.zh: 此外，模型的训练过程严重依赖大规模数据集，这可能会无意中引入社会和种族偏见。因此，模型在生成图像或推断视觉属性时，可能会无意中加剧这些偏见。

items.en: In certain cases where samples contain multiple objects or subjects, the model may exhibit a phenomenon known as “concept bleeding”. This issue manifests as the unintended merging or overlap of distinct visual elements. For instance, in Fig. 14, an orange sunglass is observed, which indicates an instance of concept bleeding from the orange sweater. Another case of this can be seen in Fig. 8, the penguin is supposed to have a “blue hat” and “red gloves”, but is instead generated with blue gloves and a red hat. Recognizing and addressing such occurrences is essential for refining the model’s ability to accurately separate and represent individual objects within complex scenes. The root cause of this may lie in the used pretrained text-encoders: firstly, they are trained to compress all information into a single token, so they may fail at binding only the right attributes and objects, Feng et al. [8] mitigate this issue by explicitly encoding word relationships into the encoding. Secondly, the contrastive loss may also contribute to this, since negative examples with a different binding are needed within the same batch [35].
items.zh: 在某些情况下，当样本包含多个对象或主体时，模型可能会表现出一种称为“概念融合”的现象。这一问题表现为不同视觉元素的意外合并或重叠。例如，在图14中，观察到一副橙色太阳镜，这表明橙色毛衣的概念发生了融合。另一个例子见图8，企鹅本应戴着“蓝色帽子”和“红色手套”，但生成的图像却是蓝色手套和红色帽子。识别并解决此类问题对于提升模型在复杂场景中准确分离和表示单个对象的能力至关重要。其根本原因可能在于所使用的预训练文本编码器：首先，它们被训练为将所有信息压缩到单个标记中，因此可能无法正确绑定属性和对象，Feng等人[8]通过将词关系显式编码到编码中来缓解这一问题。其次，对比损失也可能导致此问题，因为同一批次中需要具有不同绑定的负样本[35]。

items.en: Additionally, while our model represents a significant advancement over previous iterations of SD, it still encounters difficulties when rendering long, legible text. Occasionally, the generated text may contain random characters or exhibit inconsistencies, as illustrated in Fig. 8. Overcoming this limitation requires further investigation and development of techniques that enhance the model’s text generation capabilities, particularly for extended textual content — see for example the work of Liu et al. [27], who propose to enhance text rendering capabilities via character-level text tokenizers. Alternatively, scaling the model does further improve text synthesis [53, 40].
items.zh: 此外，尽管我们的模型相比之前的SD版本有了显著进步，但在渲染长而清晰的文本时仍会遇到困难。偶尔，生成的文本可能包含随机字符或表现出不一致性，如图8所示。克服这一局限性需要进一步研究和开发增强模型文本生成能力的技术，特别是对于较长的文本内容——例如，参见Liu等人[27]的工作，他们提出通过字符级文本分词器来增强文本渲染能力。或者，扩大模型规模也能进一步改善文本合成[53, 40]。

items.en: In conclusion, our model exhibits notable strengths in image synthesis, but it is not exempt from certain limitations. The challenges associated with synthesizing intricate structures, achieving perfect photorealism, further addressing biases, mitigating concept bleeding, and improving text rendering highlight avenues for future research and optimization.
items.zh: 总之，我们的模型在图像合成方面表现出显著优势，但也存在一定的局限性。与合成复杂结构、实现完美照片级真实感、进一步解决偏见、缓解概念融合以及改进文本渲染相关的挑战，为未来的研究和优化指明了方向。

items.en: In this section, we give a concise summary of DMs. We consider the continuous-time DM framework [47] and follow the presentation of Karras et al. [21]. Let pdata​(𝐱0)subscript𝑝datasubscript𝐱0p_{\rm{data}}({\mathbf{x}}_{0}) denote the data distribution and let p​(𝐱;σ)𝑝𝐱𝜎p({\mathbf{x}};\sigma) be the distribution obtained by adding i.i.d. σ2superscript𝜎2\sigma^{2}-variance Gaussian noise to the data. For sufficiently large σmaxsubscript𝜎max\sigma_{\mathrm{max}}, p​(𝐱;σmax2)𝑝𝐱subscript𝜎superscriptmax2p({\mathbf{x}};\sigma_{\mathrm{max}^{2}}) is almost indistinguishable from σmax2subscriptsuperscript𝜎2max\sigma^{2}_{\mathrm{max}}-variance Gaussian noise. Capitalizing on this observation, DMs sample high variance Gaussian noise 𝐱M∼𝒩​(𝟎,σmax2)similar-tosubscript𝐱𝑀𝒩0subscript𝜎superscriptmax2{\mathbf{x}}_{M}\sim{\mathcal{N}}\left(\bm{0},\sigma_{\mathrm{max}^{2}}\right) and sequentially denoise 𝐱Msubscript𝐱𝑀{\mathbf{x}}_{M} into 𝐱i∼p​(𝐱i;σi)similar-tosubscript𝐱𝑖𝑝subscript𝐱𝑖subscript𝜎𝑖{\mathbf{x}}_{i}\sim p({\mathbf{x}}_{i};\sigma_{i}), i∈{0,…,M}𝑖0…𝑀i\in\{0,\dots,M\}, with σi<σi+1subscript𝜎𝑖subscript𝜎𝑖1\sigma_{i}<\sigma_{i+1} and σM=σmaxsubscript𝜎𝑀subscript𝜎max\sigma_{M}=\sigma_{\mathrm{max}}. For a well-trained DM and σ0=0subscript𝜎00\sigma_{0}=0 the resulting 𝐱0subscript𝐱0{\mathbf{x}}_{0} is distributed according to the data.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们简要总结扩散模型。我们考虑连续时间扩散模型框架[47]，并遵循Karras等人[21]的表述。令p_data(𝐱₀)表示数据分布，p(𝐱; σ)表示向数据添加独立同分布σ²方差高斯噪声后得到的分布。对于足够大的σ_max，p(𝐱; σ_max²)几乎与σ_max²方差的高斯噪声无法区分。基于这一观察，扩散模型采样高方差高斯噪声𝐱_M ∼ 𝒩(𝟎, σ_max²)，并顺序地将𝐱_M去噪为𝐱_i ∼ p(𝐱_i; σ_i)，i ∈ {0, …, M}，其中σ_i < σ_{i+1}且σ_M = σ_max。对于训练良好的扩散模型且σ₀ = 0，得到的𝐱₀服从数据分布。

DM training reduces to learning a model 𝒔𝜽​(𝐱;σ)subscript𝒔𝜽𝐱𝜎{\bm{s}}_{\bm{\theta}}({\mathbf{x}};\sigma) for the score function ∇𝐱log⁡p​(𝐱;σ)subscript∇𝐱𝑝𝐱𝜎\nabla_{\mathbf{x}}\log p({\mathbf{x}};\sigma). items.en: To asses the generation quality of SDXL we perform a user study against the state of the art text-to-image generation platform Midjourney111We compare against v5.1 since that was the best version available at that time.. As the source for image captions we use the PartiPrompts (P2) benchmark [53], that was introduced to compare large text-to-image model on various challenging prompts.
items.zh: 为了评估SDXL的生成质量，我们针对最先进的文本到图像生成平台Midjourney¹¹进行了一项用户研究。作为图像标题的来源，我们使用了PartiPrompts (P2)基准[53]，该基准旨在比较大型文本到图像模型在各种具有挑战性的提示上的表现。

items.en: For our study, we choose five random prompts from each category, and generate four 1024×1024102410241024\times 1024 images by both Midjourney (v5.1, with a set seed of 2) and SDXL for each prompt. These images were then presented to the AWS GroundTruth taskforce, who voted based on adherence to the prompt. The results of these votes are illustrated in Fig. 9. Overall, there is a slight preferance for SDXL over Midjourney in terms of prompt adherence.
items.zh: 在我们的研究中，我们从每个类别中随机选择五个提示，并为每个提示由Midjourney（v5.1，种子设为2）和SDXL各生成四张1024×1024的图像。这些图像随后呈现给AWS GroundTruth任务组，他们根据对提示的遵循程度进行投票。投票结果如图9所示。总体而言，在提示遵循方面，SDXL略优于Midjourney。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Results from 17,153 user preference comparisons between SDXL v0.9 and Midjourney v5.1, which was the latest version available at the time. The comparisons span all “categories” and “challenges” in the PartiPrompts (P2) benchmark. Notably, SDXL was favored 54.9% of the time over Midjourney V5.1. Preliminary testing indicates that the recently-released Midjourney V5.2 has lower prompt comprehension than its predecessor, but the laborious process of generating multiple prompts hampers the speed of conducting broader tests.
items.capZh: 图9：SDXL v0.9与Midjourney v5.1（当时的最新版本）之间17,153次用户偏好比较的结果。比较涵盖了PartiPrompts (P2)基准中的所有“类别”和“挑战”。值得注意的是，SDXL在54.9%的情况下优于Midjourney V5.1。初步测试表明，最近发布的Midjourney V5.2的提示理解能力不如其前身，但生成多个提示的繁琐过程阻碍了进行更广泛测试的速度。

full.sec: Appendix F On FID Assessment of Generative Text-Image Foundation Models
full.secZh: 附录F 关于生成式文本-图像基础模型的FID评估

items.capEn: Figure 12: Plotting FID vs CLIP score for different cfg scales. SDXL shows only slightly improved text-alignment, as measured by CLIP-score, compared to previous versions that do not align with the judgement of human evaluators. Even further and similar as in [23], FID are worse than for both SD-1.5 and SD-2.1, while human evaluators clearly prefer the generations of SD-XL over those of these previous models.
items.capZh: 图12：不同cfg尺度下FID与CLIP分数的关系图。SDXL在CLIP分数衡量的文本对齐方面仅略有改善，而之前的版本与人类评估者的判断不一致。更进一步，与[23]类似，SDXL的FID比SD-1.5和SD-2.1都差，而人类评估者明显更偏好SD-XL的生成结果。

items.en: Throughout the last years it has been common practice for generative text-to-image models to assess FID- [12] and CLIP-scores [34, 36] in a zero-shot setting on complex, small-scale text-image datasets of natural images such as COCO [26]. However, with the advent of foundational text-to-image models [40, 37, 38, 1], which are not only targeting visual compositionality, but also at other difficult tasks such as deep text understanding, fine-grained distinction between unique artistic styles and especially a pronounced sense of visual aesthetics, this particular form of model evaluation has become more and more questionable. Kirstain et al. [23] demonstrates that COCO zero-shot FID is negatively correlated with visual aesthetics, and such measuring the generative performance of such models should be rather done by human evaluators. We investigate this for SDXL and visualize FID-vs-CLIP curves in Fig. 12 for 10k text-image pairs from COCO [26]. Despite its drastically improved performance as measured quantitatively by asking human assessors (see Fig. 1) as well as qualitatively (see Fig. 4 and Fig. 14), SDXL does not achieve better FID scores than the previous SD versions. Contrarily, FID for SDXL is the worst of all three compared models while only showing slightly improved CLIP-scores (measured with OpenClip ViT g-14). Thus, our results back the findings of Kirstain et al. [23] and further emphasize the need for additional quantitative performance scores, specifically for text-to-image foundation models. All scores have been evaluated based on 10k generated examples.
items.zh: 在过去的几年中，生成式文本到图像模型通常会在零样本设置下，对复杂的小规模自然图像文本数据集（如COCO [26]）评估FID [12]和CLIP分数 [34, 36]。然而，随着基础文本到图像模型 [40, 37, 38, 1] 的出现，这些模型不仅针对视觉组合性，还针对其他困难任务，如深度文本理解、独特艺术风格的精细区分，尤其是强烈的视觉美感，这种特定的模型评估形式变得越来越可疑。Kirstain等人 [23] 证明COCO零样本FID与视觉美感呈负相关，因此衡量这类模型的生成性能应更多地由人类评估者进行。我们针对SDXL研究了这一点，并在图12中展示了来自COCO [26] 的10k文本-图像对的FID与CLIP曲线。尽管通过询问人类评估者（见图1）以及定性评估（见图4和图14）定量测量，SDXL的性能显著提升，但其FID分数并未优于之前的SD版本。相反，SDXL的FID是三个比较模型中最差的，而CLIP分数（使用OpenClip ViT g-14测量）仅略有改善。因此，我们的结果支持了Kirstain等人 [23] 的发现，并进一步强调了需要额外的定量性能分数，特别是针对文本到图像基础模型。所有分数均基于10k生成样本进行评估。

items.zh: 我们使用以下图像分辨率进行第2.3节所述的混合宽高比微调。
